title: Museum board; membership
doc_html:
§1215.3.  Museum board; membership

A.  The ordinance creating the museum board shall establish the membership thereof.

B.  The members of the board shall serve without compensation.

Acts 2004, No. 424, §1.
doc_text:
§1215.3.  Museum board; membership
A.  The ordinance creating the museum board shall establish the membership thereof.
B.  The members of the board shall serve without compensation.
Acts 2004, No. 424, §1.
